title: 33<sup>rd</sup> Meeting of the FSDC Sub-Committee
description: A meeting of the Sub-Committee of the Financial Stability and Development Council (FSDC-SC) was held today at the Reserve Bank of India, Mumbai. Shri Sanjay Malhotra, Governor, Reserve Bank of India, chaired the meeting. The Sub-Committee deliberated on key global and domestic macroeconomic and financial sector developments, along with emerging issues bearing implications for financial stability. It also reviewed the progress in several inter-regulatory matters including simplification of KYC pr
